title: andreettaea kennedyi
side_effects: Andreettaea kennedyi can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its extracts has also been linked to stomach ulcers, headaches, and fatigue. In extreme cases, misuse of the plant can lead to respiratory issues, such as shortness of breath and bronchial constriction. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Andreettaea kennedyi for medicinal purposes.
